raw_reaction: 正しいし読みやすいが、これは標準的な単体体積の見方を棒切断と言い換えた域を出ない。最大級の称賛には届かない。
reason: The solution treats the original stopping time correctly and proves E[tau]=e via P(S_n<=1)=1/n!, but its substance is the familiar simplex/order-statistics volume argument. It is clear, not weak, yet not distinct or surprising enough for the persona to naturally say the target line.
